description: Create three simulated medical devices in OpenICE: a 'Multiparameter Monitor', a 'Pulse Oximeter', and an 'Infusion Pump'. Identify the Unique Device Identifier (UUID) assigned to each running device session and record them in a CSV file at /home/ga/Desktop/active_device_inventory.csv with headers 'Device Type,UUID'. The UUIDs can be found in the system logs (/home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log) or within the device details.
